span.p:
Resize disk
qemu-img resize
40 GB master / 100-200 GB worker

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
network-config.yml.j2
Static IP, gateway, DNS
routes to remote subnets via host

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
user-data.yml.j2
SSH authorized keys
packages, timezone
sysctl tuning

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Define k8s-net
virbr1 bridge
NAT + DHCP

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
virt-install
--name k8s-{master,worker}-N
--vcpus / --memory
--disk qcow2
--cdrom cloud-init.iso
--network bridge=virbr1
--os-variant ubuntu22.04

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Verify hostname
Verify IP address
Verify connectivity

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
mars: master-1, worker-1
zeus: master-2, worker-2
jupiter: master-3, worker-3
